name: Eggless Omelets
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Whip the batter until smooth. It can rest for 30 minutes to overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Heat a 9-inch skillet and, when hot, add a few drops of oil on the bottom.
4. Rotate the pan to coat the bottom.
5. Pour 1/4 cup of batter into the pan and immediately tilt and coat the pan so the batter forms an even layer over the whole bottom.
6. Cook over medium-high heat until the top starts to dry up and the edges loosen.
7. Slide a pancake turner under it, flip over, and cook the other side.
Besides serving as little omelets, these can be rolled up like crepes.
Especially good wrapped around some sauteed mushrooms or ratatouille.
